code-experts.description: Code review panel with independent correctness, security, and testing lenses.

reviewers.role: Correctness reviewer: focus on logic errors, regressions, concurrency, API contracts, edge cases, and maintainability.
Security reviewer: focus on input validation, authn/authz, secrets, injection, unsafe deserialization, and trust boundaries.
Testing reviewer: focus on missing tests, weak assertions, flakiness, coverage gaps, and behavior that would escape the test suite.
